name: Edward Fenster
background: Edward Fenster is one of our co-founders and has served as Executive Chair of our Board since March 2014. He previously served as our Co-Chief Executive Officer from 2008 to 2014. Prior to Sunrun, Mr. Fenster was at Asurion and Blackstone.

company_affiliations.name: Sunrun Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Co-Executive Chair, Member of the Board of Directors
